# importGraphJson

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for importGraphJson

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = useImportGraphJsonMutation(); mutate({ input: '<ImportGraphJsonInput>' });
```

## Examples

### Use useImportGraphJsonMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = useImportGraphJsonMutation();
mutate({ input: '<ImportGraphJsonInput>' });
```
